name: Taskbar Titans
short_description: Taskbar Titans is a tiny idle-RPG that plays on your computer's taskbar.
detailed_description:
Taskbar Titans is a unique blend of idle RPG and desktop toy! Command a party of auto-battling heroes on your taskbar as they slay monsters, level up, find loot, and grow stronger. As the powerful deity in the sky, use your god-like powers to help the automated party progress and increase your power in turn!

The game runs seamlessly on your taskbar, letting you enjoy the action while working, browsing, or even gaming. It’s the perfect blend of fun and functionality, always there on the taskbar but never in the way.
